SEARCH
Package pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.model

Interface Location

All Known Implementing Classes:
Building, Level, Room
public interface Location
Represents any location in the building hierarchy: a Building, a Level, or a Room.

Every location has a unique identifier and an optional human-readable name.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    accept(LocationVisitor visitor)
    Accepts a LocationVisitor, dispatching to the correct visit overload for this node type (double dispatch).
    double
    getArea()
    Returns the total floor area of this location in m².
    double
    getCube()
    Returns the total volume (cubature) of this location in m³.
    double
    getHeating()
    Returns the total heating energy consumption of this location.
    double
    getHeatingPerCube()
    Returns the average heating energy consumption per m³ of volume.
    int
    getId()
    Returns the unique identifier of this location.
    double
    getLight()
    Returns the total lighting power of this location in watts.
    double
    getLightPerArea()
    Returns the average lighting power per m² of floor area.
    String
    getName()
    Returns the optional name of this location, or null if not set.

  • Method Details

    • getId

      int getId()
      Returns the unique identifier of this location.
      Returns:
      location id

    • getName

      String getName()
      Returns the optional name of this location, or null if not set.
      Returns:
      location name, may be null

    • getArea

      double getArea()
      Returns the total floor area of this location in m².
      Returns:
      area in m²

    • getCube

      double getCube()
      Returns the total volume (cubature) of this location in m³.
      Returns:
      volume in m³

    • getLight

      double getLight()
      Returns the total lighting power of this location in watts.
      Returns:
      lighting power in W

    • getHeating

      double getHeating()
      Returns the total heating energy consumption of this location.
      Returns:
      heating energy consumption

    • getLightPerArea

      double getLightPerArea()
      Returns the average lighting power per m² of floor area.
      Returns:
      light per m²

    • getHeatingPerCube

      double getHeatingPerCube()
      Returns the average heating energy consumption per m³ of volume.
      Returns:
      heating per m³

    • accept

      void accept(LocationVisitor visitor)
      Accepts a LocationVisitor, dispatching to the correct visit overload for this node type (double dispatch).

      Composite nodes (Building, Level) must first propagate the call to all their children before calling visitor.visit(this), ensuring post-order traversal.

      Parameters:
      visitor - the visitor to accept
